infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SwiftDrop uses your location to set the pickup point for your delivery.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SwiftDrop uses your camera to take profile photos and upload KYC documents.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SwiftDrop accesses your photo library to set a profile picture and upload documents.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: SwiftDrop uses your location to detect your pickup point.

plugins.photosPermission: SwiftDrop accesses photos to set your profile picture.
plugins.cameraPermission: SwiftDrop uses the camera for profile photos and KYC documents.
